description: Style Note Super soft vintage leather and a variety of hues to choose from, wallets from fossil are the way to go for a look that chic and versatile effortlessly. Spice up your outfit with these funky yet conventional wallets and get ready to be on top of your game! Product Details Brown tri fold wallet that has a flap with a buttoned closure, two insert pockets with an inner zipped pocket in the middle and six card holders on one side, six card holders, one insert pocket and one id card holder on the other side, zipped pocket at the back, stitch detailing and brand name on a metallic keyhole detail on the front Material and Care Vintage leather Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Dimensions:10 cm x 19 cm
